SEARCH
Package kf

Class ListManager

java.lang.Object
kf.ListManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ListManager extends Object implements Serializable
The ListManger class is responsible for managing lists of InvoiceItem objects. It implements the Serializable interface to allow its instances to be serialized. The class maintains four lists: discounts, invoiceItems, forAll, and extraItems. It provides methods to initialize, sort, edit, add, toggle, and remove items from these lists.

Methods:

  • ListManager(): Constructor that initializes the lists and sorts the invoice items.
  • sortList(): Sorts the invoice items into forAll and extraItems lists based on their forAll property.
  • initInvoiceItems(): Initializes the invoiceItems list with predefined items and toggles the forAll property for half of them.
  • initDiscounts(): Initializes the discounts list with predefined discount items.
  • editItem(InvoiceItem, String, String, double): Edits an existing invoice item and updates the lists accordingly.
  • editDiscount(InvoiceItem, String, String, double): Edits an existing discount item and updates the discounts list.
  • addInvoiceItem(String, String, double): Adds a new invoice item to the invoiceItems list and sorts the list.
  • addDiscount(String, String, double): Adds a new discount item to the discounts list.
  • toggleForAll(InvoiceItem): Toggles the forAll property of an invoice item and updates the forAll and extraItems lists.
  • remove(InvoiceItem): Removes an invoice item from all lists.
  • removeDiscount(InvoiceItem): Removes a discount item from the discounts list.
  • getDiscounts(): Returns the discounts list.
  • getInvoiceItems(): Returns the invoiceItems list.
  • getExtraItems(): Returns the extraItems list.
  • getForAll(): Returns the forAll list.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • ListManager

      public ListManager()
      Constructor for the ListManger class. Initializes the discounts, invoiceItems, forAll, and extraItems lists. Also sorts the list after initialization.

  • Method Details

    • editItem

      public void editItem(InvoiceItem item, String name, String articleNbr, double price)
      Edits an existing invoice item with new data and updates the lists accordingly. The method removes the existing item from the lists, creates a new item with the updated data, and adds the new item to the invoiceItems list. It then sorts the list to update the forAll and extraItems lists.
      Parameters:
      item - The existing InvoiceItem object to be edited.
      name - The new name for the item.
      articleNbr - The new article number for the item.
      price - The new price for the item.

    • editDiscount

      public void editDiscount(InvoiceItem item, String name, String articleNbr, double price)
      Edits an existing discount item with new data and updates the discounts list. The method removes the existing discount item from the discounts list and creates a new discount item with the updated data. It then adds the new discount item to the discounts list.
      Parameters:
      item - The existing InvoiceItem object to be edited.
      name - The new name for the discount item.
      articleNbr - The new article number for the discount item.
      price - The new price for the discount item.

    • addInvoiceItem

      public void addInvoiceItem(String name, String articleNbr, double price) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Adds a new invoice item to the invoiceItems list and sorts the list. The method creates a new InvoiceItem object with the provided data and adds it to the invoiceItems list. It then sorts the list to update the forAll and extraItems lists.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the new item.
      articleNbr - The article number of the new item.
      price - The price of the new item.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the article number already exists in the list.

    • addDiscount

      public void addDiscount(String name, String articleNbr, double price) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Adds a new discount item to the discounts list. The method creates a new InvoiceItem object with the provided data and adds it to the discounts list.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the new discount item.
      articleNbr - The article number of the new discount item.
      price - The price of the new discount item (must be negative).
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the price is not negative or if the article number already exists in the list.

    • toggleForAll

      public void toggleForAll(InvoiceItem item)
      Toggles the forAll property of an invoice item and updates the forAll and extraItems lists. The method toggles the forAll property of the provided item and updates the forAll and extraItems lists accordingly. If the item is marked as forAll, it is removed from the extraItems list and added to the forAll list. If the item is not marked as forAll, it is removed from the forAll list and added to the extraItems list.
      Parameters:
      item - The InvoiceItem object for which to toggle the forAll property.

    • remove

      public void remove(InvoiceItem item)
      Removes an invoice item from all lists. The method removes the provided item from the invoiceItems, extraItems, and forAll lists.
      Parameters:
      item - The InvoiceItem object to be removed.

    • removeDiscount

      public void removeDiscount(InvoiceItem item)
      Removes a discount item from the discounts list. The method removes the provided discount item from the discounts list.
      Parameters:
      item - The InvoiceItem object to be removed.

    • getDiscounts

      public ArrayList<InvoiceItem> getDiscounts()
      Returns the discounts list.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of InvoiceItem objects representing the discounts list.

    • getInvoiceItems

      public ArrayList<InvoiceItem> getInvoiceItems()
      Returns the invoiceItems list.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of InvoiceItem objects representing the invoiceItems list.

    • getExtraItems

      public ArrayList<InvoiceItem> getExtraItems()
      Returns the extraItems list.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of InvoiceItem objects representing the extraItems list.

    • getForAll

      public ArrayList<InvoiceItem> getForAll()
      Returns the forAll list.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of InvoiceItem objects representing the forAll list.
